name: thepexcel-excel
description: Full Excel control via COM — Power Query, PivotTables, Data Model/DAX, VBA, dynamic arrays, charts, screenshots. Windows only.

tools.name: excel_workbook
tools.description: List, open, save, close, and inspect Excel workbooks

tools.name: excel_sheet
tools.description: Add, rename, delete, and list worksheets

tools.name: excel_range
tools.description: Read/write cell ranges, formulas, and dynamic array spill zones

tools.name: excel_powerquery
tools.description: Create, edit, load, and refresh Power Query (M code) queries

tools.name: excel_table
tools.description: Create and manage Excel structured tables (ListObjects)

tools.name: excel_pivot
tools.description: Build and configure PivotTables from tables or Data Model

tools.name: excel_datamodel
tools.description: Manage the Excel Data Model: tables, relationships, DAX measures

tools.name: excel_vba
tools.description: Read, write, and run VBA modules (requires trust setting)

tools.name: excel_name
tools.description: Manage named ranges and LAMBDA custom functions

tools.name: excel_chart
tools.description: Create, configure, and export Excel charts

tools.name: excel_screenshot
tools.description: Capture PNG screenshots of ranges, sheets, or charts

autolaunch.description: Auto-launch Excel if no instance is running

enable_vba.description: Enable the excel_vba tool (requires VBA project object model trust setting in Excel)
